description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image and a before_script that updates apt and installs libgtk-3-dev, libglib2.0-dev, libatk1.0-dev, libcairo2-dev, libgdk-pixbuf2.0-dev, libpango1.0-dev, libdbus-1-dev and libzmq3-dev. Define a single job named test:cargo (default test stage) that runs the commands `rustc --version && cargo --version` followed by `cargo test --all --verbose`. The pipeline has no additional stages, caches, artifacts, services, or rules.
